name: glacis-webhook-ingestion
description: AI-powered webhook ingestion service: classifies and normalizes arbitrary vendor JSON into canonical shipment/invoice records.

scripts.dev: npm run db:migrate && concurrently -n api,worker -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:worker"
scripts.db:reset: sequelize-cli db:drop || true && sequelize-cli db:create && sequelize-cli db:migrate
